creator: chris@thil.de
text:
The problem is rather related to libspf2 than exim.
When trying on the command line with the supplied spf_query tool, I  
get the same segfault.

[chris@galibier ~]# spfquery -ip=1.2.3.4 -sender=chris@thil.de
Segmentation fault: 11 (core dumped)
[chris@galibier ~]# spfquery -ip=88.198.155.186 -sender=chris@thil.de
pass

You can close this bug as I'll address it directly to the libspf2  
maintainer.


Greetings,
Christophe
